understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level to win, progressing through multiple levels until the entire game is completed.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is only horizontal via MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT; after each move gravity pulls you in the current direction (DOWN = toward decreasing y, UP = toward increasing y) until landing on a tile. CLICK removes breakable blocks `x` with coordinates. Spikes `u`/`v` instantly end the run if landed on. UNDO can revert a prior action. Corridor scans reveal passage columns where you drop to new level sections; clicks create fall paths by clearing `x` blocks.
